_comment: Real reviews go here. Tony — replace the [PLACEHOLDER] entries with actual testimonials before promoting reviews.html publicly. Schema: name, occasion, rating (1-5), date (YYYY-MM-DD), title (short), body, ringSlug (matches RINGS catalog), verified (bool), source (Google | WeddingWire | Instagram | Direct).

reviews.name: [Customer initial]
reviews.title: [Short, vivid title from the review]
reviews.body: [2-4 sentences in the customer's voice. What they came in worried about, how Tony handled it, the moment of the proposal/anniversary, how the ring has held up.]
